author: @mark.guitar
text: The bass guitar you have in the background is a good illustration of this point. Complex bass playing is fun but the bass player of U2 just plays simple driving basslines. The simplicity frames the songs by locking into the relentless "vibe" of the music. Complexity has it's place in art and design, often complementing and accentuating simple, "clean lines". Necessary complexity is just a lot of simple solutions brought to bear on a problem, eg. a mechanical self winding watch with a calender is far more complex than an old "nurse's Timex". Meanwhile a Chopard retirement watch gains it's perceived value from it's precise complexity. We are strange creatures...

author: @ibme8359
text: "Occam's razor" states that the simplest explanation is preferable to one that is more complex!!

author: @jsat5609
text: This is one of the things that really bothers me about AI;   whatever advantages come from using it,  it also brings another level of almost unimaginable complexity,  and with it,  more things to tear up,  break down,  malfunction,  or do God knows what else.

author: @Ken00001010
text: As an inventor, you always have to look out for adding complexity just to push the realization of why it won't work, over your own thought horizon.

author: @totherarf
text: I love a good mnemonic and KISS is about as good as it gets!

author: @mzeewakazi
text: Brilliant analogy, my grandfather said to me, the more complicated you make it the more difficult it becomes. 😊

replies.author: @jsat5609
replies.text: Corollary:   The purpose of labor saving devices is to make you work harder.

author: @ErikWatson89
text: bananas in a sub tropical enviroment, i believe a self powered supplimental geodesic dome utilising MFC/geothermal and flourescent plastic with supplimental light system is more than possible. like the idea of news paper reonforced with polymer as spokes, this project has more than enough room for upcycling.
